ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the project is associated with */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain the project belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, paused, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the domain was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the domain was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "billing_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for billing purposes */,
  "technical_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for technical support */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource */,
  "limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of the resource */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the resource is associated with */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain the resource belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the resource (e.g., active, inactive, deleted) */,
  "usage_policy" TEXT /* Policy for resource usage (e.g., burst, sustained) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project using the resource */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of resource usage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the usage event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the usage event was last updated */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the usage event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_usage_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quota_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quota request */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account making the request */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource for which the quota is being requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "new_limit" INTEGER /* New limit requested by the account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the quota request was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the quota request was last updated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the quota increase request */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the request */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the request was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quota_requests_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quota_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quota_requests_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., create, read, update, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was logged */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being allocated */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the resource is allocated to */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain the resource belongs to */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was allocated */,
  "allocation_count" INTEGER /* Count of resource allocation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the allocation event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the allocation event was last updated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the resource allocation */,
  "allocated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who allocated the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_history_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_history_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_history_allocated_by FOREIGN KEY ("allocated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_history_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)
